vision_profile.current_state: Priyambada has intermediate full stack development skills and strong public speaking abilities.
vision_profile.main_blocker: The current challenge is to structure learning to quickly become job-ready for full stack engineer roles.
vision_profile.top_motivation: Priyambada is highly motivated to secure a full stack engineer placement during the upcoming placement season.

milestones.label: P1
milestones.identity_statement: Build a strong base in web technologies and understand how web applications work.
milestones.market_value_display: Fresher — not yet earning from this skill

modules.title: Introduction to Web Architectures
modules.description: Learn the fundamental structure of how web applications communicate and operate.

skills.title: Understanding Client-Server Model
skills.description: Grasp the core concept of how clients (browsers) request data from servers.

skills.title: Basics of HTTP/HTTPS
skills.description: Learn about the protocols that power communication on the web, including secure connections.

skills.title: RESTful API Principles
skills.description: Understand how web services communicate using RESTful architecture for data exchange.

modules.title: Essential Backend Concepts
modules.description: Dive into the server-side logic, data storage, and core programming for web applications.

skills.title: Database Fundamentals (SQL/NoSQL basics)
skills.description: Understand how to store and manage data for web applications using different database types.

skills.title: Server-Side Logic Introduction
skills.description: Learn how to write code that runs on the server to handle requests and interact with databases.

skills.title: Basic Data Structures for Web
skills.description: Understand fundamental data structures (e.g., arrays, objects/dictionaries) used in web development for efficient data handling.

scenario.title: Choose Data Structure for User Profile

modules.title: Frontend Interaction Basics
modules.description: Start building the visual and interactive parts of web applications that users see and use.

skills.title: HTML Structure and Semantics
skills.description: Learn to create the basic building blocks and layout of web pages using HTML.

scenario.title: Structure a Blog Post with HTML

skills.title: CSS Styling Fundamentals
skills.description: Add visual appeal to web pages by learning how to style HTML elements with CSS.

skills.title: Basic JavaScript DOM Manipulation
skills.description: Make web pages interactive by modifying HTML and CSS using JavaScript.

milestones.label: P2
milestones.identity_statement: Develop full-fledged applications by integrating modern backend and frontend frameworks.

modules.title: Backend Frameworks and Data Management
modules.description: Master backend development using frameworks and manage complex data interactions.

skills.title: Choosing a Backend Framework (e.g., Node.js/Express concepts)
skills.description: Understand popular backend frameworks and how to select one for your projects.

scenario.title: Set Up a Basic Express Server

skills.title: Advanced Database Interactions (ORMs, indexing concepts)
skills.description: Optimize database queries and manage data relationships using Object-Relational Mappers and indexing.

scenario.title: Implement an ORM for a Blog App

skills.title: Authentication and Authorization Basics
skills.description: Secure your web applications by implementing user login, registration, and access control.

scenario.title: Add User Login to an API

modules.title: Frontend Frameworks and Components
modules.description: Build dynamic and responsive user interfaces using modern frontend frameworks and reusable components.

skills.title: Introduction to a Frontend Library/Framework (e.g., React concepts)
skills.description: Explore popular frontend tools like React to build interactive user interfaces efficiently.

skills.title: Component-Based UI Development
skills.description: Break down complex UIs into smaller, reusable components for better organization and scalability.

skills.title: State Management Fundamentals
skills.description: Manage data and user interactions across your application using state management techniques.

modules.title: System Design for Scalability
modules.description: Learn to design web applications that can handle many users and grow over time.

skills.title: Microservices vs. Monolith Architecture
skills.description: Understand different ways to structure your application and choose the best fit for scalability.

skills.title: Load Balancing and Caching Concepts
skills.description: Distribute incoming network traffic and store frequently accessed data to improve performance and availability.

skills.title: Message Queues and Asynchronous Processing
skills.description: Handle time-consuming tasks without blocking user experience using message queues.

milestones.label: P3
milestones.identity_statement: Deploy robust applications, optimize for performance, and prepare for career opportunities.

modules.title: Deployment and Operations
modules.description: Learn how to package, deploy, and manage your applications in a production environment.

skills.title: Containerization with Docker (Concepts)
skills.description: Package your application and its dependencies into isolated containers for consistent deployment.

skills.title: Cloud Deployment Basics (e.g., AWS/GCP/Azure fundamental concepts)
skills.description: Learn the basics of deploying applications to cloud platforms like AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure.

scenario.title: Plan Cloud Resources for an App

skills.title: CI/CD Pipeline Fundamentals
skills.description: Automate the process of building, testing, and deploying your code changes reliably.

modules.title: Performance and Security
modules.description: Make your applications fast, reliable, and secure against common threats.

skills.title: Web Application Security Threats (OWASP Top 10)
skills.description: Identify and prevent common security vulnerabilities in web applications.

skills.title: Performance Optimization Techniques (Frontend & Backend)
skills.description: Apply methods to make your web applications load faster and respond quicker.

skills.title: Testing and Debugging Strategies
skills.description: Write effective tests and troubleshoot issues to ensure your application works correctly.

modules.title: Interview Readiness and Projects
modules.description: Build compelling projects, hone problem-solving skills, and prepare for technical interviews.

skills.title: Building a Portfolio Project (Full Stack)
skills.description: Create a complete full-stack application to showcase your skills to potential employers.

scenario.title: Plan a Full Stack E-commerce App

skills.title: Data Structures & Algorithms for Interviews
skills.description: Solve common coding problems using essential data structures and algorithms.

skills.title: Behavioral and System Design Interview Prep
skills.description: Prepare for common interview questions, including system design challenges and discussions about your experience.
